creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
This is related to PR 118476.  The attached diff adds the other languages in doc/ to the sample refuse list in Section A.5.3.1 of the Handbook:

--- chapter.sgml.orig	2007-12-07 09:55:40.000000000 -0500
+++ chapter.sgml	2007-12-07 09:56:28.000000000 -0500
@@ -1291,8 +1291,10 @@
 doc/el_*
 doc/es_*
 doc/fr_*
+doc/hu_*
 doc/it_*
 doc/ja_*
+doc/mn_*
 doc/nl_*
 doc/no_*
 doc/pl_*
